NOVO.CO.verdict: The Amazon/oral Wegovy catalyst is 100% verified and real, but the email is a news relay devoid of analysis — the stock faces a much harsher 2026 than the headline implies, with guided sales declines, Lilly competition intensifying, insider selling, and a CagriSema trial failure since the email date; accumulate only on further weakness with a long-term horizon.
